title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - H&M India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with H&M India! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Varanasi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About H&M India:
H&M India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H&M India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
